figures.title: System Architecture for Production-Backed Digital Currency
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 1 - System Architecture graph TD subgraph SYSTEM["100 - Production-Backed
Digital Currency System"] A102["102 - Currency
Engine"] A104["104 - Production
Verification Module"] A106["106 - Monetary
Policy Engine"] A108["108 - Federation
Governance Module"] end A110["110 - Append-Only
Hash-Chain
Audit Ledger"] subgraph ZONES["112 - Autonomous
Economic Zones"] A114["114 - Zone A"] A116["116 - Zone B"] A118["118 - Zone C"] end A120["120 - Resource
Categories"] A104 -->|Verified Production| A102 A102 -->|Supply Adjustments| A106 A108 -->|Trust-Derived
Authority Levels| A102 A108 <-->|Coordination| A106 A108 <-->|Governance| ZONES A102 <-->|Transactions| ZONES A102 -->|Record| A110 A120 -->|Production Reports| A104 style SYSTEM fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style ZONES fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A102 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A104 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A106 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A108 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A110 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A114 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A116 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A118 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A120 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Currency Minting and Transaction Lifecycle
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 2 - Currency Lifecycle graph LR subgraph MINT["200 - Currency
Minting"] A202["202 - Production
Report"] A204["204 - Resource-to-Currency
Weight Calculation"] A206["206 - Multi-Signature
Auditor Approval"] end A208["208 - Currency
Supply"] subgraph TRANSFER["210 - Inter-Zone
Transfer"] A212["212 - Source Zone"] A214["214 - Destination Zone"] end subgraph BURN["216 - Supply
Contraction"] A218["218 - Burn
Operation"] A220["220 - Reserve
Locking"] end subgraph LEDGER["222 - Hash-Chain
Audit Ledger"] A224["224 - Transaction
Record"] A226["226 - Audit Hash
H(prev + details)"] A228["228 - Tamper-Evident
Chain"] end MINT -->|Mint Amount| A208 A208 --> TRANSFER A208 --> BURN A206 -->|Gate| A208 MINT --> LEDGER TRANSFER --> LEDGER BURN --> LEDGER style MINT fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style TRANSFER fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style BURN fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style LEDGER fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A202 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A204 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A206 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A208 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A212 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A214 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A218 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A220 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A224 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A226 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A228 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Production Verification Pipeline
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 3 - Production Verification Pipeline flowchart TD A300["300 - Production
Report Submission"] --> A302{"302 - Bounds
Checking"} A302 -->|Negative Qty| A304["304 - Rejected"] A302 -->|Pass| A306{"306 - Statistical
Anomaly Detection"} A306 -->|Exceeds Configurable
Anomaly Threshold| A308["308 - Flagged for
Manual Review"] A306 -->|Pass| A310{"310 - Cryptographic Hash
Integrity Verification"} A310 -->|Mismatch| A312["312 - Rejected
Tampered"] A310 -->|Pass| A314{"314 - Multi-Signature
Auditor Approval"} A314 -->|Insufficient
Signatures| A316["316 - Pending
Approval"] A314 -->|Approved| A318["318 - Verified
Production"] A318 --> A320["320 - Eligible for
Currency Minting"] style A300 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A302 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A304 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A306 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A308 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A310 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A312 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A314 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A316 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A318 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A320 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Monetary Policy Engine State Diagram
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 4 - Monetary Policy State Diagram
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> s400
    s400: 400 - Neutral Phase
    s402: 402 - Expansionary Phase
    s404: 404 - Contractionary Phase
    s406: 406 - Emergency Phase
    s400 --> s402: Inflation below configurable lower bound
    s400 --> s404: Inflation above configurable upper bound
    s402 --> s400: Inflation within configurable target band
    s404 --> s400: Inflation within target band
    s404 --> s406: Inflation exceeds emergency threshold
    s406 --> s404: Inflation below emergency threshold
    s408: 408 - Taylor-Rule Variant
    s410: 410 - Interest Rate Adjustment
    s412: 412 - Currency Supply Adjustment
    s414: 414 - Reserve Ratio Management

figures.title: Federation Governance Pipeline
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 5 - Federation Governance Pipeline graph LR A500["500 - Zone
Instances"] --> A502["502 - Stage 1
Observe"] A502 --> A504["504 - Stage 2
Assess Trust"] A504 --> A506["506 - Stage 3
Check Freeze"] A506 --> A508["508 - Stage 4
Modulate Authority"] A508 --> A510["510 - Stage 5
Enforce Phases"] subgraph OBSERVE["512 - Observe
Metrics"] A514["514 - Response
Rate"] A516["516 - Average
Latency"] A518["518 - Partition
Detection"] end subgraph ASSESS["520 - Trust
Assessment"] A522["522 - Exponential Decay
of Operational
Divergence"] A524["524 - EMA
Smoothing"] A526["526 - Recovery
Boost"] end subgraph MODULATE["528 - Trust-Derived
Authority Levels"] A530["530 - High Trust
Autonomous Minting"] A532["532 - Medium Trust
Co-Signature"] A534["534 - Low Trust
Full Consensus"] end subgraph PHASES["536 - Federation
Phases"] A538["538 - Synchronized"] A540["540 - Diverging"] A542["542 - Partitioned"] A544["544 - Recovering"] end A502 --> OBSERVE A504 --> ASSESS A508 --> MODULATE A510 --> PHASES style A500 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A502 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A504 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A506 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A508 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A510 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style OBSERVE fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style ASSESS fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style MODULATE fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style PHASES fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A514 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A516 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A518 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A522 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A524 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A526 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A530 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A532 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A534 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A538 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A540 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A542 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A544 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Universal Basic Income Distribution
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 6 - UBI Distribution graph TD A600["600 - Periodic
Distribution Trigger"] --> A602{"602 - Current Monetary
Policy Phase?"} A602 -->|Expansionary| A604["604 - Expanded
Amount"] A602 -->|Neutral| A606["606 - Standard
Amount"] A602 -->|Contractionary| A608["608 - Reduced
Amount"] A602 -->|Emergency| A610["610 - Distribution
Suspended"] A604 --> A612{"612 - Zone
Eligibility Check"} A606 --> A612 A608 --> A612 A612 -->|Eligible| A614["614 - Distribute
to Zone"] A612 -->|Ineligible| A616["616 - Skip Zone"] A614 --> A618["618 - Audit
Record"] style A600 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A602 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A604 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A606 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A608 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A610 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A612 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A614 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A616 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px style A618 fill:#fff,stroke:#000,stroke-width:2px

figures.title: Inter-Zone Settlement Engine
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 7 - Inter-Zone Settlement
sequenceDiagram
    participant ZA as 700 - Zone A
    participant SE as 702 - Settlement Engine
    participant ZB as 704 - Zone B
    participant AL as 706 - Hash-Chain Audit Ledger
    ZA->>SE: Initiate Trade with Reference ID
    SE->>SE: 708 - Validate Balance
    SE->>SE: 710 - Record Trade Details
    SE->>ZA: 712 - Debit Amount
    SE->>ZB: 714 - Credit Amount
    SE->>AL: 716 - Link to Physical Resource Trade via Reference ID
    SE->>AL: 718 - Chain Audit Hash
